publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-09-17 18:31:37 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, printed materials, publications, research materials.
did.abstract: Patents, articles and clippings concerning electrical engineering; correspondence with Arthur A. Allen, catalog of glass negatives and photo albums.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Alexander DuBois, an electrical engineer, was a graduate student at Cornell University from 1908 to 1910. He taught at Cornell and Purdue Universities, and devised specialized photographic equipment for nature photography. Also an ornithologist, his field notes, articles and photographs appeared in THE CONDOR, THE AUK, THE WILSON BULLETIN, BENT'S LIFE HISTORIES OF NORTH AMERICAN BIRDS, and BRITISH BIRDS. He also authored GLIMPSES OF BIRD LIFE, published posthumously in 1973.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Patents, articles and clippings concerning electrical engineering; thesis for graduate degree in electrical engineering, University of Illinois, 1912; manuscript of book THE POWER-FACTOR (not published). Also, bibliography, clippings and correspondence relating to DuBois' work as an ornithologist, especially his photography. Includes correspondence with Arthur A. Allen. Also, a catalog of glass negatives and photo albums organized by bird species as well as other black and white photographs and ornithological notes.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: The Olin Seawall Pettingill, Jr. papers, #4047 also includes a catalog of bird photographs.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series I. Electrical Engineering Papers Box 1

p.ref: Catalog of Glass Plate Negatives of Birds, Nests and Eggs

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Alexander Dawes DuBois. Papers, #3803. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Engineering Articles and Clippings by DuBois
Patent Materials for Methods and Means for Measuring and Recording Interval Demand for Apparent Power
Patent Materials for Torque Equalizing Systems
Patent Materials for Methods and Means for Measuring and Recording Apparent Power
Appendix to Sketches from Bird Life
"Birds and their Ways" Notes and Legend
List of Photographs for use of "The Ways of Birds"
Legends to Photos of Birds According to Habitat for "Birds and their Ways"
Collection of Eggs, Nests and Mounted Birds Records
Clippings and Materials regarding photographs in magazines
Photo lists; key to the location of Specimen data in field journals
Index to Plates - arranged by species
Nesting Dates: Cayuga Basin; Illinois and elsewhere
Field Observation of Wood Warblers; Bird Field Book and Museum Notes and a small journal with notes on photography

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Birds (American Ornithological Union numbers 475-768) and nest lists

did.unittitle: Partial Life List; Birds; Nest Data
Notes sent to A.C. Bent for "The Life Histories of North American Birds"
Index to Bird Photos: Volume I
Index to Bird Photos: Volume II
Index to Bird Photos: Volume III

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photo album of AOU species number 567-766 (some numbers not represented)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photo album of Species numbers 3-375 (some numbers not represented)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photo album of Species numbers 387-563 (some numbers not represented)

did.unittitle: Box A: Photographic prints of Water Birds, Marsh Birds, amd Shore Birds
Box A2: Photographic prints of Bitterns, Egrets, and Herons
Box C: Photographic prints of Owls, Goatsuckers, Hummers, Kingfishers and Woodpeckers
Box D: Photographic prints of Flycathers, Larks, Swallows, Jays, Raven, Chickadee, Wrens, and Pewee
Box D2: Photographic prints of Thrushes, Catbird, Mockingbird, Thrashers, and Bluebird
Box F: Photographic prints of Sparrows, Juncos, and Longspurs
Box of large size duplicate negatives
Photographic prints of Doves, Grouse, Bob-whites and Misc.
"Extra Prints" includes Baltimore Orioles, Herons, Egrets, Cranes, Franklin's Grouse, and Misc

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Also includes some Bird photograph index cards

did.unittitle: Photo album of DuBois in the field

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes notes on chemistry, exposure, camera, paper etc.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes notes on chemistry, exposure, camera, paper etc.

did.unittitle: Box of hand colored glass lantern slides by E. Harold
Wooden box of lantern slides with some notes
2 boxes of unmounted glass lantern slides
Wooden box of 5x7 glass negatives. Includes Negatives 417-587 from catalog and other duplicates.
Cigar Box with 35mm slides; other color transparencies; negatives; and notes
Catalog of Glass Plate Negatives of Birds, Nests and Eggs

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: See Box 3 & 4 for prints from these negatives and Box 2 for printed indexes to plates

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Some of these are 5x7 plates in Box 5

did.unittitle: Negatives 836-876; positives; tests; and negatives with different numbering system
